data.title: Two solo Bitcoin miners defy odds, each earning $300K this week as U.S. mining control weakens.
data.description: This week, two individual Bitcoin miners achieved rare victories, with each earning close to $300,000. This comes as the U.S. mining sector's dominance shows a decline.

data.title: Bluerock Homes Trust (BHM) releases Q1 dividends on Series A and Series B Preferred Stock.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. disclosed via PRNewswire that their Board of Directors sanctioned and declared monthly cash dividends on the Company's Series A Redeemable Preferred Stock. The Company trades on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol BHM. This move underscored the Company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders.

data.title: Kroger Health helped 250,000 students complete drug safety program for high schools. #KrogerHealth #PrescriptionDrugSafety
data.description: In Cincinnati on January 15, 2026, Kroger Health, the healthcare arm of The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), disclosed their assistance to over 250,000 students in finishing the drug safety program for high schoolers, Prescription Drug Safety: Know the Truth.

data.title: Anderson & Vreeland celebrates 65 years in flexographic printing since starting in 1961, focused on customer support.
data.description: A technology solutions provider, Anderson & Vreeland Inc. (A&V), based in Bryan, Ohio, is celebrating its 65th anniversary, as it began operating in January 1961. Specializing in customer support, A&V has been dedicated to serving the flexographic industry.

data.title: Casca named winner in 2026 BIG Innovation Awards for banking and financial services, CEO Lukas Haffer recognized.
data.description: Lukas Haffer, co-founder and CEO, was recently honored in the category of Banking and Financial Services for his innovation. Casca, the pioneering AI-based loan origination platform, received accolades. The recognition was received in San Francisco on January 15, 2026.

data.title: XBRL US partners with CRAFT to enhance research in structured data for financial tech. Conference set for Spring 2026.
data.description: A collaborative conference focusing on enhancing artificial intelligence (AI) is scheduled for Spring 2026 in New York. XBRL US, a nonprofit organization committed to enhancing reporting through an open data standard, has partnered with the Center for Research toward Advancing Financial Technologies (CRAFT). The conference aims to optimize AI technologies and is set to take place in the spring of 2026. This collaboration showcases the importance of advancing financial technologies and leveraging AI for improved reporting standards. Stay tuned for more information on this significant event.

data.title: INTA opens registration for 2026 Annual Meeting in London, May 2-6. Marks its 148th meeting. Successful pre-registration.
data.description: The 148th Annual Meeting of the International Trademark Association (INTA) has been announced to be held in London, England from May 2 to May 6, 2026. The event registration has now commenced following the record-breaking pre-registration numbers in the association's history, indicating strong interest and participation.

data.title: Unitek Learning offers Carson Tahoe Health employees BSN, PN, and MA programs to enhance education opportunities.
data.description: In Tempe, Arizona on January 15, 2026, Unitek Learning disclosed the introduction of new educational programs for healthcare professionals. The programs include Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN), Practical Nursing (PN), and Medical Assisting (MA) for employees at Carson Tahoe. Unitek Learning is renowned for its healthcare education and workforce development initiatives.

data.title: Fusion Advisors partners with Victory Live for commercial strategy in live events. Founded by Greg Kish and Sam Soni, CEO.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, Fusion Advisors, a strategic advisory firm established by Greg Kish, revealed a new partnership with Victory Live, the primary ticketing technology and analytics corporation for live events led by CEO Sam Soni. This collaboration aims to enhance the industry through their combined expertise.

data.title: FAU earns Carnegie Community Engagement Classification for 2026, one of 277 U.S. universities, 11 with three designations.
data.description: Boca Raton, Florida - In a significant achievement, Florida Atlantic University has been recognized as one of only 277 colleges and universities in the United States to receive the prestigious Carnegie Community Engagement Classification for the year 2026. This elective designation is awarded to institutions that demonstrate exceptional commitment to community engagement. Notably, FAU is also among the select group of just 11 universities nationally to have secured three Carnegie designations, showcasing its strong emphasis on community collaboration and outreach. This recognition underscores FAU's dedication to fostering meaningful relationships beyond the campus and its impact on broader society.

data.title: TSMC reports 35% increase in net profit in Q4, signaling strong AI demand. CRWV stock rising.详情 at Benzinga.com.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd. (NYSE: TSM) released an impressive Q4 earnings report, signaling robust growth in AI demand. TSMC, as the sole producer of NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) GPUs, reported a remarkable 35% increase in net profit, surpassing analyst predictions. This demonstrates the ongoing strength of the AI market. Concurrently, CoreWeave, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWV) stock is experiencing an uptick in value, reflecting the positive trend. For neocloud providers such as CoreWeave, the booming demand for AI technology presents significant opportunities. Access the detailed article on the topic at Benzinga.com.
